sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86573" key="proanafusa/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προανα-φῡσάω</orth>, <sense id="n86573.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">play a prelude on the flute,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">προσαναφυσάω.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
